name: didala-plugin
description: Reusable AI workflow skills shared across Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Personal AI workflows for review, design, and delivery.
interface.longDescription: Didala Plugin collects reusable AI workflows that can be installed in Codex and mirrored for Claude Code. It includes plan-align for requirement review, solution design, dependency analysis, scheduling, and Lark document write-back, plus worktree-flow for safe Git worktree creation and cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Use plan-align to review this Lark requirement
Use plan-align to design one module
Use plan-align to re-review changed requirements
Use worktree-flow to create a worktree for this feature
Use worktree-flow to clean current project worktrees
